rationale: Acting on Review 1 forces addition of a premature `aut_apply_root` lemma + simp attribute move, bloating the intentionally-minimal 'Layer 0' API (explicitly scoped by the module docstring to just the two exposed facts, deferring (Z/2)^n identification); this is neither required nor an obvious maintainer win under api-design. Review 2's sound approve leaves the PR with exactly the intended surface, so produces the better result.
